deep_dive.title: LooseControlVideo: Directorial Video Control using Spatial Blocking
deep_dive.abstract: Precise 3D spatial orchestration in text-to-video generation remains a significant challenge, particularly for multi-object scenes where semantic layout and temporal dynamics are often entangled. While existing depth-conditioned models achieve good structural fidelity, they necessitate dense, frame-accurate guidance that is labor-intensive to author for dynamic events involving deformable objects. We present LooseControlVideo, a framework that enables intuitive and expressive control by using sparse, oriented 3D boxes as a "blocking" proxy. This allows users to author high-level layout and trajectory while leveraging a video generative model to generate realistic occlusions, dynamics and interactions. We achieve this by fine-tuning a Wan 2.2 backbone on a video dataset annotated with DNOCS, a novel encoding for 3D size, orientation and depth-ordered occlusions. Furthermore, our method allows for localized refinement, such as adjusting a jump trajectory or adding an interaction, with minimal disruption to the global scene context. Extensive evaluations on the nuScenes, HO-3D, and BEHAVE benchmarks demonstrate that LooseControlVideo significantly outperforms existing 2D-box and flow-based baselines. Our findings indicate a 1.2x to 3x improvement in Trajectory Error; 2x improvement in Rigid Motion Consistency; and a 1.5x to 2x increase in Occlusion Accuracy over current state-of-the-art layout-conditioned models, demonstrating that oriented 3D primitives provide good geometric prior for complex, multi-agent video authoring.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: fine-tuning a Wan 2.2 backbone for video generation with 3D control
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 在Wan 2.2骨干网络上微调实现视频生成的3D控制
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 在Wan 2.2骨干网络上微调实现视频生成的3D控制
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 在Wan 2.2骨干网络上微调实现视频生成的3D控制
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: LooseControlVideo fine-tunes a Wan 2.2 backbone to use sparse oriented 3D boxes as a blocking proxy for intuitive directorial video control, generating realistic occlusions and dynamics from high-level layout and trajectory input.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 文本到视频生成中，精确3D空间编排仍具挑战，深度条件模型需密集帧级指导，作者负担重。本文提出松散控制视频框架，通过在Wan 2.2骨干网络上微调，使用稀疏定向3D框作为遮挡代理，实现直观导演式控制。用户指定高层布局和轨迹，模型生成逼真遮挡、动态和交互。该方法减轻了动态场景的创作劳动，展示了基于Wan模型的视频生成控制新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 文本到视频生成中，精确3D空间编排仍具挑战，深度条件模型需密集帧级指导，作者负担重。本文提出松散控制视频框架，通过在Wan 2.2骨干网络上微调，使用稀疏定向3D框作为遮挡代理，实现直观导演式控制。用户指定高层布局和轨迹，模型生成逼真遮挡、动态和交互。该方法减轻了动态场景的创作劳动，展示了基于Wan模型的视频生成控制新范式。
